news.title:
KFin Technologies schedules Q4FY26 earnings call on April 30, 2026, at 11:00 AM IST.
Management, including CEO Sreekanth Nadella, to discuss strategy and financial results.
news.summary:
KFin Technologies schedules Q4FY26 earnings call on April 30, 2026, at 11:00 AM IST.
Management, including CEO Sreekanth Nadella, to discuss strategy and financial results.

news.title:
KFin Technologies' board updates Code for Fair Disclosure to align with insider trading rules.
Revised code is published on the company website, enhancing compliance and transparency.
news.summary:
KFin Technologies' board updates Code for Fair Disclosure to align with insider trading rules.
Revised code is published on the company website, enhancing compliance and transparency.

news.title:
KFin Technologies amends its Code of Practices for Unpublished Price Sensitive Info.
Changes align with updated PIT regulations; details available on KFin's website.
news.summary:
KFin Technologies amends its Code of Practices for Unpublished Price Sensitive Info.
Changes align with updated PIT regulations; details available on KFin's website.

news.title: KFin Technologies to review its Q4 results on April 29.
news.summary: KFin Technologies to review its Q4 results on April 29.

news.title:
KFin Technologies to hold a board meeting on April 29, 2026, to approve audited financial results.
Trading window for designated persons opens 48 hours after results are declared to stock exchanges.
news.summary:
KFin Technologies to hold a board meeting on April 29, 2026, to approve audited financial results.
Trading window for designated persons opens 48 hours after results are declared to stock exchanges.

news.title:
KFin Technologies' subsidiary, KGTL, receives IFSCA registration as a TechFin and Ancillary Services Provider.
Certificate granted under IFSCA Act 2019 with perpetual validity unless canceled or surrendered.
news.summary:
KFin Technologies' subsidiary, KGTL, receives IFSCA registration as a TechFin and Ancillary Services Provider.
Certificate granted under IFSCA Act 2019 with perpetual validity unless canceled or surrendered.

news.title:
KFin Technologies outlines GST-exclusive brokerage payouts for mutual funds from April 1.
Distributors must remit GST to receive full commission; non-registered ones get base brokerage only.
news.summary:
KFin Technologies outlines GST-exclusive brokerage payouts for mutual funds from April 1.
Distributors must remit GST to receive full commission; non-registered ones get base brokerage only.

news.title:
MF Central appoints Supratim Bandyopadhyay as Chairman, Rajesh Krishnamoorthy as CEO.
Formed by CAMS, KFin Tech, aims to improve governance, digital infrastructure per SEBI.
news.summary:
MF Central appoints Supratim Bandyopadhyay as Chairman, Rajesh Krishnamoorthy as CEO.
Formed by CAMS, KFin Tech, aims to improve governance, digital infrastructure per SEBI.

news.title:
KFin Technologies' Q3 FY26 revenue rose 11.4% YoY to INR 323 Cr, including acquisition.
EBITDA grew 14.6% YoY to INR 151.6 Cr with 40.9% margin; 328 clients added via acquisition.
news.summary:
KFin Technologies' Q3 FY26 revenue rose 11.4% YoY to INR 323 Cr, including acquisition.
EBITDA grew 14.6% YoY to INR 151.6 Cr with 40.9% margin; 328 clients added via acquisition.

news.title:
Kfin Technologies trades 0.96x avg daily volume; 9L shares worth Rs. 97 Cr on NSE.
CMP at 9:24 AM is Rs. 1049.1, up 4.8%.
news.summary:
Kfin Technologies trades 0.96x avg daily volume; 9L shares worth Rs. 97 Cr on NSE.
CMP at 9:24 AM is Rs. 1049.1, up 4.8%.

news.title:
KFin Technologies appoints Mr. Nazish Hussain Mir as CTO, effective April 1, 2026.
Mir, previously led a 400-employee digital unit, focusing on AI and modernization.
news.summary:
KFin Technologies appoints Mr. Nazish Hussain Mir as CTO, effective April 1, 2026.
Mir, previously led a 400-employee digital unit, focusing on AI and modernization.

news.title:
KFin Technologies reports Q3 results with 28% growth but margin dip.
Company expands globally under leadership of Sreekanth Nadella.
news.summary:
KFin Technologies reports Q3 results with 28% growth but margin dip.
Company expands globally under leadership of Sreekanth Nadella.

news.title:
KFin Technologies aims to maintain 40-45% margins through FY27, supported by operational efficiencies and the Ascent Fund Services acquisition.
With ₹500 crore cash reserves, KFin plans strategic acquisitions and tech transformation to build a scalable global fund administration platform.
news.summary:
KFin Technologies aims to maintain 40-45% margins through FY27, supported by operational efficiencies and the Ascent Fund Services acquisition.
With ₹500 crore cash reserves, KFin plans strategic acquisitions and tech transformation to build a scalable global fund administration platform.

news.title: KfinTech shares rise 5% after Q3 results; Jefferies sees 34% upside.
news.summary: KfinTech shares rise 5% after Q3 results; Jefferies sees 34% upside.

news.title:
KFin Technologies' CTO resigned, effective Feb 15, 2026, citing personal reasons.
Resignation was submitted on Nov 16, 2025, with no direct relationship disclosures.
news.summary:
KFin Technologies' CTO resigned, effective Feb 15, 2026, citing personal reasons.
Resignation was submitted on Nov 16, 2025, with no direct relationship disclosures.

news.title:
KFIN Tech posts Q3 net profit of 920M, down from 933.1M QoQ, missing 1B estimate.
Revenue rises to 3.74B rupees in Q3, compared to 3.09B rupees QoQ.
news.summary:
KFIN Tech posts Q3 net profit of 920M, down from 933.1M QoQ, missing 1B estimate.
Revenue rises to 3.74B rupees in Q3, compared to 3.09B rupees QoQ.

news.title:
KFin Technologies' Q3FY26 revenue grew 27.9% YoY to ₹3,708.7M.
Core PAT rose 9.1% YoY to ₹983.9M, driven by diversification and new deals.
news.summary:
KFin Technologies' Q3FY26 revenue grew 27.9% YoY to ₹3,708.7M.
Core PAT rose 9.1% YoY to ₹983.9M, driven by diversification and new deals.

news.title:
KFin Technologies' promoter group seeks reclassification to public category.
Board approved, subject to stock exchanges' no objection; regulatory process to follow.
news.summary:
KFin Technologies' promoter group seeks reclassification to public category.
Board approved, subject to stock exchanges' no objection; regulatory process to follow.

news.title:
KFin Technologies announced the resignation of Ms. Manju Anand, Chief Compliance Officer and Legal Head, effective January 31, 2026.
The resignation was tendered on September 25, 2025, citing pursuit of new opportunities. Relevant disclosures are provided as per SEBI regulations.
news.summary:
KFin Technologies announced the resignation of Ms. Manju Anand, Chief Compliance Officer and Legal Head, effective January 31, 2026.
The resignation was tendered on September 25, 2025, citing pursuit of new opportunities. Relevant disclosures are provided as per SEBI regulations.

news.title:
KFin Technologies Ltd schedules Q3FY26 earnings call on Feb 16, 2026 at 11:00 AM IST.
Management, including MD & CEO Sreekanth Nadella, will discuss financial results and business outlook.
news.summary:
KFin Technologies Ltd schedules Q3FY26 earnings call on Feb 16, 2026 at 11:00 AM IST.
Management, including MD & CEO Sreekanth Nadella, will discuss financial results and business outlook.
